title: Excel node not retrieving files from shared locations
symptom: The workbook cell in the Excel node shows 'no results' when trying to select a file. This occurs even though the files are accessible via a shared link.
applies_when: Files stored in OneDrive or shared locations
not_this_if: Files are owned by the connected Microsoft account
root_cause: The Excel node only displays files owned by the connected Microsoft account. If the files are shared or stored in a location not owned by the account, they will not appear in the dropdown list.
fix_steps: Move the Excel file into the OneDrive of the same Microsoft account used in the node.
Click the refresh icon beside the Workbook parameter.
If the file still does not appear, switch to 'Enter manually / By path' and paste the full OneDrive or SharePoint link to the file.
agent_instruction: Move the Excel file to your OneDrive and refresh the node, or enter the file path manually.
